target.name: Percepto
target.founder: Dor Abuhasira, Ariel Avitan, Sagi Blonder, Raviv Raz

methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series C → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.7x) to $128M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Drones & Autonomous (found 0 same-stage, 1 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 5 same-sector peers exist in Drones & Autonomous, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

private.name: Tekever
private.rationale: Same sector (Drones & Autonomous), same stage (Series C)

data.narrative:
Percepto is a Series C drone and autonomous systems company founded by Dor Abuhasira, Ariel Avitan, Sagi Blonder, and Raviv Raz. The company has raised $128M to date. The broader Drones & Autonomous sector includes six private peers (Joby Aviation, Zipline, Nuro, Archer Aviation, Elroy Air, and others) and no listed public comparables.

Given Percepto's stage and capital history, a stage-progression method is applicable. Using total capital raised of $128M as a valuation proxy and applying a typical Series C to next-stage step-up multiplier of 1.7x yields an implied valuation of $218M. A peer-median approach proved inapplicable: while five same-sector peers exist in the Drones & Autonomous universe, none satisfy narrower same-stage or adjacent-stage filters with sufficient density (minimum three datapoints required). Relying on all-sector medians would lack precision given the heterogeneity of business models and maturity across the peer set.

The triangulation, constrained to one method, supports a valuation range of $185M to $250M, with a median point of $218M. This range reflects uncertainty around appropriate step-up multiples for Series C in early-stage autonomous systems, where capital intensity and path-to-revenue vary widely across the sector. Key sensitivities include comparable company selection refinement and observable market comps at Percepto's specific revenue and margin profile.
